steps.title: Spot the correspondence
steps.content: Morris rejects industrialization; the Kelmscott editions use handmade, medieval-style materials. The key signal is that his philosophy is directly embodied in these design choices.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
”Manifest in” means “is clearly displayed in.” His rejection of industrialization is displayed in the handmade materials.

The others don't capture this correspondence: “insensible to” reverses the relationship, while “scrutinized by” and “complicated by” describe examination or obstruction.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
